SELECT right_grapheme(text_column, 0) FROM grapheme_test WHERE text_column IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*), right_grapheme(text_column, 1) FROM grapheme_test GROUP BY right_grapheme(text_column, 1);
SELECT DISTINCT right_grapheme(text_column, 1) FROM grapheme_test WHERE text_column IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.desc_column, b.text_column, right_grapheme(b.text_column, 1) AS last_grapheme FROM another_text_table a JOIN grapheme_test b ON a.desc_column IS NOT NULL ORDER BY last_grapheme;
SELECT right_grapheme(text_column, 1) FROM (SELECT text_column FROM grapheme_test WHERE text_column LIKE '%🤦%') AS sub_query;
SELECT right_grapheme(text_column, 1) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT text_column FROM grapheme_test) AS distinct_query WHERE text_column IS NOT NULL;
